nodes.name: admin.css.bak
nodes.summary: Backup copy of the admin panel stylesheet (1578 lines), retained as a `.bak` file rather than the active CSS used by the admin UI.

nodes.name: admin.js
nodes.summary: Largest frontend script (~11,880 lines) implementing the entire admin panel: dashboard, line/product/process management, daily and OT plan editing, workstation plan upload, hourly progress and efficiency reporting, and system update/rollback controls.
nodes.languageNotes: Plain browser script (no ES module import/export) bootstrapped via a single DOMContentLoaded listener; organizes ~323 top-level functions by feature area (dashboard, plans, OT, reports, system updates) rather than classes.

nodes.name: requireAuth
nodes.summary: Verifies an authenticated admin session on page load and redirects to login if absent.

nodes.name: setupNavigation
nodes.summary: Wires up sidebar navigation link clicks to section switching.

nodes.name: setupMobileSidebar
nodes.summary: Sets up the collapsible sidebar behavior for mobile viewports.

nodes.name: loadSection
nodes.summary: Loads and renders the data for whichever admin section the user navigated to.

nodes.name: loadDashboard
nodes.summary: Loads and renders the main admin dashboard summary cards and line overview.

nodes.name: viewLineDetails
nodes.summary: Opens the detailed view for a single production line, loading its current plan and status.

nodes.name: openLineDetailsPage
nodes.summary: Builds and displays the full line-details page including plan, OT, and progress sections.

nodes.name: loadProducts
nodes.summary: Fetches and renders the products list/table in the admin products section.

nodes.name: viewProductProcess
nodes.summary: Displays the process/workstation breakdown for a selected product.

nodes.name: openPlanUploadModal
nodes.summary: Opens the modal for uploading an Excel-based daily plan.

nodes.name: submitPlanUpload
nodes.summary: Submits the uploaded Excel plan file to the plan-upload-excel API and handles the response.

nodes.name: loadDailyPlanData
nodes.summary: Loads the daily plan data for a selected line and date.

nodes.name: _buildLdTbody
nodes.summary: Builds the table body markup for the line-details workstation/process table.

nodes.name: ldPreviewCopyPlan
nodes.summary: Renders a preview of copying a workstation plan to another date/line before confirming.

nodes.name: renderLineDetailsContent
nodes.summary: Renders the full content panel for the line-details page, combining plan, employee, and OT data.

nodes.name: saveLineDetails
nodes.summary: Persists edits made on the line-details page back to the server.

nodes.name: fillOtLineCard
nodes.summary: Populates an overtime summary card for a line with target/actual figures.

nodes.name: printDailyPlans
nodes.summary: Generates a printable view of the daily plans across lines.

nodes.name: renderOTPlanDetails
nodes.summary: Renders the detailed OT plan view for a line and date.

nodes.name: _buildSingleOsmDailyCard
nodes.summary: Builds a single OSM (output-shipment-measure) daily report card.

nodes.name: _buildEfficiencyTable
nodes.summary: Builds the efficiency report table aggregating worker/workstation output against targets.

nodes.name: _buildWorkerIndividualEffTable
nodes.summary: Builds the per-worker individual efficiency breakdown table.

nodes.name: renderSystemUpdateSection
nodes.summary: Renders the system update/rollback admin section showing current version and available actions.

nodes.name: ie.js
nodes.summary: Frontend script for the Industrial Engineer (IE) attendance panel: loads, renders, edits, and saves daily employee attendance records with realtime updates.

nodes.name: loadAttendance
nodes.summary: Fetches and renders the attendance list for the selected date.

nodes.name: renderRow
nodes.summary: Renders a single attendance table row for an employee.

nodes.name: formatStatus
nodes.summary: Formats an attendance status code into a display label.

nodes.name: filterAttendance
nodes.summary: Filters the rendered attendance rows by search/status criteria.

nodes.name: saveRow
nodes.summary: Saves a single edited attendance row to the server.

nodes.name: saveAll
nodes.summary: Saves all pending attendance edits in bulk.

nodes.name: saveAttendance
nodes.summary: Performs the API call to persist attendance changes.

nodes.name: setupRealtime
nodes.summary: Subscribes to SSE events to keep the attendance view live-updated.

nodes.name: showToast
nodes.summary: Displays a transient toast notification message.

nodes.name: login.js
nodes.summary: Small frontend script controlling the login modal open/close behavior and submitting login credentials to the authentication API.

nodes.name: openLogin
nodes.summary: Opens the login modal dialog.

nodes.name: closeLogin
nodes.summary: Closes the login modal dialog.

nodes.name: submitLogin
nodes.summary: Submits the entered username/password to the login API and handles success/failure.

nodes.name: low-output-alerts.js
nodes.summary: Self-contained IIFE behavior module powering the low-output-alerts floating action button and modal, fetching and rendering summary/detail tabs of underperforming workstations against static HTML markup in ie.html.
nodes.languageNotes: Wrapped in an immediately-invoked function expression (IIFE) to avoid polluting globals; binds to pre-existing static DOM elements rather than generating its own shell.

nodes.name: escHtml
nodes.summary: Escapes a string for safe HTML interpolation.

nodes.name: updateBadge
nodes.summary: Updates the alert-count badge on the floating action button.

nodes.name: openModal
nodes.summary: Opens the low-output-alerts modal and triggers data refresh.

nodes.name: closeModal
nodes.summary: Closes the low-output-alerts modal.

nodes.name: renderModal
nodes.summary: Renders the modal shell and active tab content.

nodes.name: renderSummaryTab
nodes.summary: Renders the summary tab listing aggregated low-output alerts.

nodes.name: renderDetailsTab
nodes.summary: Renders the detailed tab listing individual workstation low-output entries.

nodes.name: fetchAlerts
nodes.summary: Fetches current low-output alert data from the API.

nodes.name: init
nodes.summary: Initializes the low-output-alerts module, wiring up the FAB and modal event handlers.

nodes.name: management.js
nodes.summary: Frontend script (~2,455 lines) for the management dashboard: line metrics, material tracking, OSM and efficiency reports, and worker efficiency graphs, refreshed via realtime SSE events.

nodes.name: requireAuth
nodes.summary: Verifies an authenticated management session and redirects to login if absent.

nodes.name: setupMobileSidebar
nodes.summary: Sets up the collapsible sidebar behavior for mobile viewports.

nodes.name: setupRealtime
nodes.summary: Subscribes to SSE data-change events to keep the management dashboard live-updated.

nodes.name: loadMgmtMaterialTracking
nodes.summary: Loads material/WIP tracking data for the management material-tracking section.

nodes.name: refreshMgmtMaterialTracking
nodes.summary: Refreshes the rendered material tracking cards without a full reload.

nodes.name: buildMgmtMaterialGroupCard
nodes.summary: Builds the markup for a single material-tracking group card.

nodes.name: loadManagementDashboard
nodes.summary: Loads and renders the top-level management dashboard summary.

nodes.name: loadLineOptions
nodes.summary: Loads the list of production lines into a select dropdown.

nodes.name: loadLineMetrics
nodes.summary: Loads efficiency/output metrics for a selected line.

nodes.name: loadMgmtOsmReport
nodes.summary: Loads the OSM (output-shipment-measure) report data.

nodes.name: _buildMgmtOsmTable
nodes.summary: Builds the OSM report table markup.

nodes.name: _buildMgmtOsmRangeTable
nodes.summary: Builds the OSM report table for a date-range view.

nodes.name: loadMgmtEfficiencyReport
nodes.summary: Loads efficiency report data for the management efficiency section.

nodes.name: _buildMgmtEfficiencyTable
nodes.summary: Builds the full efficiency report table aggregating per-line/worker output against targets.

nodes.name: buildMgmtWorkerEfficiencyGraphs
nodes.summary: Builds chart data/markup for worker efficiency trend graphs.

nodes.name: loadMgmtWorkerIndividualEff
nodes.summary: Loads individual worker efficiency data.

nodes.name: buildMgmtWorkerIndividualEffTable
nodes.summary: Builds the individual worker efficiency breakdown table.

nodes.name: loadMgmtWorkerEfficiencyGraphs
nodes.summary: Loads the data feeding the worker efficiency graphs.

nodes.name: downloadReport
nodes.summary: Triggers download of a generated report file.

nodes.name: downloadRangeReport
nodes.summary: Triggers download of a date-range report file.

nodes.name: offline-db.js
nodes.summary: IndexedDB wrapper singleton (OfflineDB) providing local storage for a pending sync queue and cached API responses to support offline operation in the shop-floor UI.
nodes.languageNotes: Implemented as a plain object literal singleton (`const OfflineDB = {...}`) rather than a class, exposing methods like init/addToSyncQueue directly as object properties.

nodes.name: init
nodes.summary: Opens (and upgrades if needed) the IndexedDB database, creating the sync-queue and cache object stores.

nodes.name: addToSyncQueue
nodes.summary: Adds a pending offline action to the sync queue store for later replay when connectivity returns.

nodes.name: offline-sync.js
nodes.summary: OfflineSync singleton managing online/offline detection, queuing actions while offline via OfflineDB, and background syncing of queued actions when connectivity is restored.
nodes.languageNotes: Plain object-literal singleton; depends on OfflineDB for persistence and exposes on/off listener registration for status changes.

nodes.name: init
nodes.summary: Sets up online/offline event listeners and starts periodic background sync.

nodes.name: handleOnline
nodes.summary: Handles the browser coming back online: updates status and triggers a sync attempt.

nodes.name: handleOffline
nodes.summary: Handles the browser going offline: updates status indicator and notifies listeners.

nodes.name: updateStatusIndicator
nodes.summary: Updates the visible online/offline status indicator in the UI.

nodes.name: notifyListeners
nodes.summary: Notifies registered listeners of an offline/online status change event.

nodes.name: getStatus
nodes.summary: Returns the current online/offline and syncing status.

nodes.name: WorkSync_Pitch_Deck.docx
nodes.summary: Word document pitch deck describing WorkSync for stakeholders, served as a static downloadable file from the public directory.
